sglang.title: model(vlm): pixtral
sglang.author: KivenChen
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR is a proposal to add support for Pixtral (#2351), and removes blockers to accelerate future Mistral multimodal integrations, such as Mistral 3.1 Small. Feedback and suggestions for improvements are welcome and appreciated.
Modifications

 PixtralVisionModel – a leading vision mode

sglang.title: perf: optimize local_block_table memory allocation
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The current implementation of the local attention mechanism in FlashAttentionBackend allocates significantly more memory than necessary for the local_block_table tensor. This over-allocation becomes particularly problematic for models with large context lengths, leading to unnecessary GPU

sglang.title: [Bug] Fix accidental logger override caused by internVL.
sglang.author: lifuhuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
I noticed that sglang stopped logging info level logs whenever I use multimodal models. E.g. there is no "the server is fired up and ready to roll" when I load any multimodal model:

I debugged a little bit and found out it's introduced in #5350: sglang loads all processors when loading m

vllm.title: [Bugfix][V1] Only get input embeddings w/ multi-modal models if first PP
vllm.author: jinhuang12
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes multi-modal model using PP on V1 by only calling model.get_input_embeddings for the first PP rank. Prior to this fix, all PP ranks would attempt to invoke model.get_input_embeddings in which the layer does not exist on the other ranks, resulting in the following stack trace:
ERROR 04-2

vllm.title: [BugFix] Set default random seed to 0 for V1
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, the random seed is unset (seed=None) by default. This behavior was originally intended for vLLM V0, where the driver (rank-0) worker shared the same process as the user, causing any fixed seed to affect the user process.
In vLLM V1, however, each worker typically runs in its own process d

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix marlin moe fallback logic for llama4
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Introduces checks on FusedMoE specific configs like apply_router_weight_on_input or activation that certain kernels can't support.
Without this logic fix, running RedHatAI/Llama-4-Scout-17B-16E-Instruct-quantized.w4a16 will result in:
  File "/home/mgoin/code/vllm/vllm/model_executor/layers/fused_mo

vllm.title: [Benchmarks] Refactor run_structured_output_benchmarks.sh
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Use keyword arguments instead of positional arguments
Support more parameters
Add help text
Adjust some defaults to be in line with past benchmark results
I've made for structured output.

Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: Convert `.buildkite` to `ruff format`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
If we are converting directory x:

In x, we add a local pyproject.toml which:

overrides isort to use the black profile
overrides ruff's line length to 88 (it's own default)
removes the deprecated type ignores
enables formatting of code in docstrings (good for the API docs)


We add x to the list of

vllm.title: [Fix] check to make sure processor has chat templates
vllm.author: aarnphm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR address a small chore check to make sure that the processor has the chat_template attributes
before accessing check for None. This problem arises with models such as microsoft/Phi-3.5-vision-instruct
with trust_remote_code=True and there are no chat_template in the processor class here.
DEBU

vllm.title: [V1] DP scale-out (2/N): Decouple engine process management and comms
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This decouples the management of engine processes from the IPC, and adds support for a mix of local and/or remote engines (where remote are running on a different node).
When there are any remote engines, tcp transport is used for the zmq sockets, otherwise ipc (domain-socket based) is used.
Engines

vllm.title: [Docs] Expand security doc with firewall info
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Emphasize the importance of firewall configuraiton on vLLM systems
exposed to potentially untrusted networks.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: [FEAT] [ROCm]: Add AITER Block-Scaled GEMM Feature
vllm.author: vllmellm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Description
This PR integrates the Block-Scaled GEMM functionality from AITER into vLLM, and will allow any up-coming optimizations in AITER kernel to be directly used and evaluated within the vLLM framework.
Implementation
The gemm_a8w8_blockscale kernel from AITER has been added to /vllm/model_exe

vllm.title: [v1][KVCacheManager] pass num_new_computed_tokens to kv cache manager
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt: For hybrid allocator, the logic to get num_computed_tokens from a KVCacheBlocks will be complex. To avoid computing that value in allocate_slots, we pass it from the return value of get_computed_blocks to the argument of allocate_slots

vllm.title: [Fix] Support CUDAGraph capture for encoder-decoder on ROCm
vllm.author: ProExpertProg
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
On main, encoder-decoder models are supported on ROCm with --enforce-eager, but when capturing CUDA Graphs, a stale assert is triggered, saying the ROCM_FLASH attention backend isn't supported (which it is as it runs successfully in eager mode). This PR removes that assert.
Tested with:
vllm serve o

vllm.bodyExcerpt: Addresses issue affecting Whisper models (and other models when using runai streaming) where tokenizer files couldn't be found due to incorrect path resolution. When loading from S3, the system was attempting to load tokenizer files from the model directory instead of the tokenizer directory, causin

vllm.title: [core][distributed] add ep group and all2all interface
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
the all2all interface should be refactored with a follow-up from #15956 .
this PR mainly adds ep (expert parallel) group, and all2all base class, so that backend-dependent code like pplx's pplx_init will not invade into common code path (vllm/distributed/parallel_state.py) .

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix FP8 Marlin MoE and enable for compressed-tensors models
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We were missing fp8_fused_exponent_bias_into_scales in prepare_moe_fp8_layer_for_marlin where we apply it correctly already in the dense case in prepare_fp8_layer_for_marlin. Thanks @jinzhen-lin for point this out. This fixes for the quant_method: "fp8" pathway as well.
I also standardized the arg s

vllm.title: [Bugfix][V1] Fix FlashInfer V1 backend using the wrong VllmConfig
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #17483 (comment)
Thanks to @chenyang78 for reporting and @heheda12345 for the fix.
The global vllm config may not be set by set_current_vllm_config, so we should read it from runner directly so self.vllm_config = runner.vllm_config. This is already what FlashInfer V0 does so this was likely just

vllm.author: qli88
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Changes to adapt new AITER MLA API (MTP is not enabled)
Some other bug fixes.

This PR is for AITER API changes introduced by commit 939f741fc37f46694e48c32c7164f49eae2584c4 (merged on 04/20/2025). AITER versions after this commit require this patch to work.

vllm.title: Fix broken example: examples/offline_inference/profiling at scheduler_config
vllm.author: Ecthlion
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary: New vllm can not run examples/offline_inference/profiling because line 196
scheduler_config = llm.llm_engine.scheduler_config
it should be
scheduler_config = llm.llm_engine.vllm_config.scheduler_config

vllm.title: [Fix] Move "model_config" as keyword args in chat_utils.py
vllm.author: lk-chen
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In #17805, trust_remote_code was removed, and model_config was added as first argument. It broke ray-project/ray#52975.
Now other python code that relies on chat_utils.py need to:
resolve_format_kwargs = dict(
  ...
  model_config=model_config,
)
try:
    resolved = resolve_chat_template_content_for
